Bash(pip install PyGithub 2>&1 | tail -3 && python3 -c "
# Search for the PR that adds qwen3_tts support
import urllib.request, json
url = 'https://api.github.com/search/code?q=qwen3_tts_tokenizer_12hz+repo:huggingface/transformers'
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers={'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3+json'}\)
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
    data = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)
    for item in data.get\('items', []\):
        print\(item['path'], item['html_url']\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
